query_normalized: evaluating calibration of predictive intervals in time series forecasting statistics
rationale: The paper focuses on hierarchical probabilistic forecasting and evaluates performance using CRPS and hierarchical coherence, without addressing calibration of predictive intervals (e.g., coverage, reliability diagrams). It does not measure the calibration metric central to the user's question, nor does it serve as a foundational reference for interval calibration methods. Hence it falls outside the relevant literature.
